ideal_must_detect.matched_text: would likely significantly affect the price
no announcement to any RIS until jointly agreed
any unauthorised disclosure may constitute market abuse

Term Sheet — recommended cash acquisition of Nettlefold Analytics plc by Northborough Capital Partners LLP, a UK private fund adviser, via a court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement under Part 26 of the Companies Act 2006.

Consideration: 412 pence per share in cash; enterprise value approximately £286,000,000; represents a 32% premium to the undisturbed closing price; financing underwritten by Farrowe & Gate Securities Ltd (fictional broker).

Inside information: non-public Q4 run-rate, pipeline conversion, and forecast margin assumptions are precise and, if disclosed, would likely significantly affect the price; maintain Article 18 insider lists and treat this as Inside Information under UK MAR.

Conditions precedent: satisfactory due diligence; FCA change-in-control approvals for regulated subsidiaries; Takeover Panel clearance of scheme document; shareholder approvals; long stop date 31 March 2027.
Integration plan: forecast c.200 bps gross margin expansion from QuiltCloud Prime migration is not yet publicly announced and remains price-sensitive until RIS disclosure.
Exclusivity, fees, and costs: parties agree to 45 days’ exclusivity and each bears its own costs; break fee provisions to be negotiated in line with the Takeover Panel’s practice statements.

must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — recommended cash acquisition of Nettlefold Analytics plc by Northborough Capital Partners LLP, a UK private fund adviser, via a court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement under Part 26 of the Companies Act 2006.
Issuer: Nettlefold Analytics plc (UK incorporated; premium listing on the Main Market); transaction subject to FCA oversight, UK MAR, and the City Code on Takeovers and Mergers; no announcement to any RIS until jointly agreed.
Consideration: 412 pence per share in cash; enterprise value approximately £286,000,000; represents a 32% premium to the undisturbed closing price; financing underwritten by Farrowe & Gate Securities Ltd (fictional broker).
Strategic rationale: integration of RiverLoom Edge and PixelNest Pro analytics lines; the combination is expected to level the playing field and provide a shot in the arm to cross-sell across UK financial-services clients.
Inside information: non-public Q4 run-rate, pipeline conversion, and forecast margin assumptions are precise and, if disclosed, would likely significantly affect the price; maintain Article 18 insider lists and treat this as Inside Information under UK MAR.
Conditions precedent: satisfactory due diligence; FCA change-in-control approvals for regulated subsidiaries; Takeover Panel clearance of scheme document; shareholder approvals; long stop date 31 March 2027.
Key personnel and access: Mr. Rowan Hale (Chief Risk Officer), diagnosed with epilepsy and openly gay, will enter a 12-month retention; biometric facial-recognition login records confirm his model-validation access windows and will be audited post-completion.
Employee matters: buyer to honour the Equal Opportunities Policy and Market Conduct Handbook; no redundancies planned for 12 months; we value inclusion and diversity across the group.
Facilities and community: head office to remain at Harpswell Yard, Grafton-on-Sea; a friendly training fixture with Brambleton Rovers at the community ground is unrelated to the deal and has no bearing on completion.
Confidentiality and market conduct: information herein is confidential and price-sensitive; any unauthorised disclosure may constitute market abuse under FSMA 2000 and UK MAR; data room uses biometric gates and healthy redundancy, without reference to any person.
Integration plan: forecast c.200 bps gross margin expansion from QuiltCloud Prime migration is not yet publicly announced and remains price-sensitive until RIS disclosure.
Exclusivity, fees, and costs: parties agree to 45 days’ exclusivity and each bears its own costs; break fee provisions to be negotiated in line with the Takeover Panel’s practice statements.
Governing law and jurisdiction: non-binding term sheet (other than costs, exclusivity, confidentiality); governed by the laws of England and Wales; disputes subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the English courts.
Contacts: Ms. Priya Kent (Corporate Secretary), priya.kent@nettlefoldplc.co.uk; Mr. Alastair Dune (Partner), alastair.dune@northboroughpartners.uk; general enquiries: dealdesk@northboroughpartners.uk
